<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Formatter; interface Tag { public function getName(): string; /** * @return Tag|mixed Class that implements Tag * @phpstan-return ?Tag */ public static function create(string $body); public function render(?Formatter $formatter = null): string; public function __toString(): string; }
